# GCATbio ORF 合成清单 — Hp3 phage-encoded enzymes

> 由 `/tmp/codon_opt_hp3.py`(DNAChisel) 生成 · 配套方案见 `enzybiotic-synthesis-proposal.md`

## 合成规格
- **codon-optimized for *E. coli*** (cell-free TXTL 兼容)
- 每条 ORF = ATG 起始 + **C-末端 His6 tag** + stop(TAA)
- 已规避常用酶切位点: EcoRI, BamHI, NdeI, XhoI, HindIII, NcoI, SalI, NotI
- GC 控制 35–65% (滑窗 50 bp)
- ⚠️ **GCATbio 可用自家引擎按其合成工艺 re-optimize**;蛋白序列是 ground truth,DNA 是参考版
- 源序列: `analyses/data/00-raw/d14-taxonomy/hp3_proteins.faa` (Hp3 / GenBank PX754746.1)

## ORF 清单

| ORF | Tier | aa(+His6) | bp | GC% | transOK |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| hp3_0070_endolysin | Tier1 | 233 | 702 | 55.3 | ✓ |
| hp3_0069_holin1 | Tier1 | 151 | 456 | 54.6 | ✓ |
| hp3_0099_holin2 | Tier2 | 92 | 279 | 54.1 | ✓ |
| hp3_0055_tailfiber | Tier3 | 411 | 1236 | 57.5 | ✓ |

### hp3_0070_endolysin  [Tier1]
Amidase endolysin (PHROG822 Amidase_2 + PG_binding) — MVP 主候选

- 蛋白 227 aa (+C-His6 = 233 aa) · ORF 702 bp · GC 55.3% · translation-check **PASS**

**Protein (+C-His6):**
```
MGHVFNRPSRPVERVFVHCSASDVPAHDDVKVIQQWHKQRWPDLCATEAGYHFFIKKDGTIQPSRSLEKKPVAQAGHNSHTIAICLHGLKVAKFTEQQKAALQSLCQEIFDAYDGNITFHGHREVAAKDCPVIDYKAWLGLDRMGRLHGRSPTKPVATPMPTLKVGSRGGMVMELQSLLGFTGSQVDGKFGGATERAVMAFQRKAGLVDDGIVGRNTWKALQTEGGAHHHHHH
```

**Codon-optimized ORF (DNA, ready to synthesize):**
```

```

### hp3_0069_holin1  [Tier1]
Holin #1 (PHROG7045) — 膜蛋白, 与 endolysin 共表达验证协同

- 蛋白 145 aa (+C-His6 = 151 aa) · ORF 456 bp · GC 54.6% · translation-check **PASS**

**Protein (+C-His6):**
```
MPHEVVFADELLKQLPVINYIVFGALSSCGALIRYLWDGMRGASGFTISGLLLYLVFGFFVGNLIGPYVSMAAAYFGITADQQGFRDSLLLACGFAVREILEVVPAFIRGRLEKVGLVKADGKNQGKPKGVTNAPNALPADNNEEHHHHHH
```

**Codon-optimized ORF (DNA, ready to synthesize):**
```

```

### hp3_0099_holin2  [Tier2]
Holin #2 (PHROG7045) — 可选增强

- 蛋白 86 aa (+C-His6 = 92 aa) · ORF 279 bp · GC 54.1% · translation-check **PASS**

**Protein (+C-His6):**
```
MNSMMTILAGQFVVSYATIFLRGVQTQNVVHGDYKQAALTSCLMSVCNVTFIGMVVANPWLSLAPSAAGGALGVVSAMYLKRRNKKHHHHHH
```

**Codon-optimized ORF (DNA, ready to synthesize):**
```
ATGAACAGCATGATGACCATTCTGGCGGGCCAGTTCGTGGTGAGCTATGCGACCATTTTTCTGCGCGGCGTGCAGACCCAGAACGTGGTGCATGGCGATTATAAACAGGCGGCGCTGACCAGCTGCCTGATGAGCGTGTGCAACGTGACCTTTATTGGCATGGTGGTGGCGAACCCGTGGCTGTCTTTAGCACCATCTGCAGCAGGTGGCGCGTTGGGCGTTGTGAGCGCGATGTATCTGAAACGCCGCAACAAAAAACATCATCATCATCATCATTAA
```

### hp3_0055_tailfiber  [Tier3]
Tail fiber (PHROG5986, novel) — depolymerase 假设 wet-lab 判决 (五重 in-silico 阴性, 不预设)

- 蛋白 405 aa (+C-His6 = 411 aa) · ORF 1236 bp · GC 57.5% · translation-check **PASS**

**Protein (+C-His6):**
```

```

**Codon-optimized ORF (DNA, ready to synthesize):**
```

```

## 诚实边界（写进合成单备注）
- `hp3_0055` **不得标注为 depolymerase**(Pfam/InterProScan/Phold-Foldseek/MMseqs2/AlphaFold 五重 in-silico 阴性);合成仅为一次性 wet-lab 终判其有无降荚膜活性。
- `hp3_0069`/`hp3_0099` 为 **holin(膜蛋白)**,cell-free 表达需脂质体/去垢剂;先做可溶的 `hp3_0070` endolysin(MVP)。
- A. hydrophila 革兰阴性 → 外源 endolysin 活性测定需配 **EDTA/OM-permeabilizer**(或 Artilysin 融合)防假阴性。
